hero.title: A Solid Foundation for Your Project
hero.subtitle: CFA Bored Piles • Vibro Piling • Horizontal Directional Drilling

about.title: About Us
about.p1: TOO АЛУА (Alua LLP) is a specialized engineering company delivering a full range of piling works and trenchless utility installation across Kazakhstan. Founded in 1999 and licensed for specialized foundation works since 2004, the company became one of the pioneers of CFA technology in Kazakhstan. We execute projects of any complexity — from residential foundation systems to large-scale industrial infrastructure.
about.p2: Our own fleet of 25+ specialized machines from world-leading manufacturers — Soilmec, Liebherr, Delmag, MAIT, SANY — ensures independence from subcontractors and guarantees schedule compliance. Every project is supervised by qualified engineers with full quality documentation.
about.p3: Over 140 companies — major developers, general contractors, and government entities in Kazakhstan — have chosen us as a reliable partner for mission-critical construction projects. The company's portfolio includes 24 completed trenchless utility installation projects.
about.mission: To provide a reliable foundation for Kazakhstan's construction projects through advanced technology, highly skilled professionals, and uncompromising quality standards at every stage of the process.
about.vision: To be a company trusted in Kazakhstan's specialized foundation works market for its reliability, safety, and modern approach.

items.desc: Continuous Flight Auger (CFA) piling technology. Diameter: 400–1,500 mm. Depth: up to 35 m. Equipment: Soilmec CM 48 and CM 70. Key advantages: minimal vibration, no soil excavation, high load-bearing capacity (up to 600 tonnes per pile). Ideal for confined urban environments and seismically active zones.

Driving Larssen sheet piles, steel pipes (Ø up to 630 mm), and reinforced concrete piles using the FINAROS-800 vibratory hammer (static moment: 35 kg·m, frequency: 38 Hz). Applications: excavation shoring, bank protection, temporary retaining walls. Advantages: high driving speed, extractable for reuse.

Trenchless utility installation via guided boring and Horizontal Directional Drilling (HDD). Equipment: Ditch Witch JT3020 (USA) — bore length up to 300 m, Ø up to 400 mm; UNP-100 (Russia) — thrust 1,000 kN, Ø up to 1,500 mm. Benefits: no road surface disruption, minimal traffic interference, landscape preservation.

Jacking steel casing pipes 325–1,500 mm in diameter under active roads and railways. Purpose: installation of water supply, sanitary and storm sewers, heating networks, and power cable conduits. Work is performed without traffic interruption and with full geodetic alignment control.

Installation of enlarged piles using DDS (Displacement Drilling System) technology. The method compacts soil around the borehole, increasing pile bearing capacity without increasing diameter. Applied in challenging ground conditions to achieve maximum bearing capacity.

Comprehensive turnkey piling services: site investigation, pile field design, rebar cage production on the automated SHNELL Cage Making Machine line (Ø 300–2,000 mm, length up to 14 m), drilling, concreting with integrity monitoring, pile load testing, and handover with a complete as-built documentation package.

contact.title: Discuss Your Project
contact.resultPiles: We deliver CFA bored piles, vibro piling, and sheet piling. Submit a request — our engineer will contact you within one hour.
contact.resultPuncture: Road and railway undercrossings, HDD, and steel casing jacking. Describe your task for a cost estimate.
contact.resultQuote: To prepare a commercial proposal, please provide project details, scope, and timeline. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.resultOther: Reach out to us through any convenient channel — we are ready to answer your questions.

certificates.title: Certificates & Licenses
certificates.desc: Alua LLP operates under State License No. 015231 dated June 10, 2004. Category II — unlimited term. In addition, Alua LLP has the capability to lay utility lines by drilling under roads and other obstacles where open excavation is not feasible. These works are carried out using equipment manufactured in the USA and Russia. Alua LLP has established partnerships with various similar companies and can involve them in piling projects when necessary.

footer.desc: Specialized foundation engineering: CFA bored piles, vibro piling, trenchless utility installation. Almaty, Kazakhstan.
